name: Marketing
description: Your full-stack AI marketing operator for solo founders. One agent that covers positioning, SEO & content, email & lifecycle, social, paid & growth, and conversion copy. No upfront onboarding — I ask for what I need as we work. Chat-first, markdown outputs, drafts only (I never publish).
author: Houston Simplified Verticals

agentSeeds..houston/activity.json: [{"id":"a1c7f4b8-3e9d-4c2f-b6a1-08c5d2e1f7b3","title":"Start anywhere — I'll ask for what I need","description":"No upfront onboarding. Open the Overview tab and click any tile that sounds useful — positioning, SEO audit, welcome email, LinkedIn post, ad campaign, landing-page critique. When I need something specific about your company, ICP, voice, or tooling, I'll ask one targeted question (best way first: connect via Composio in the Integrations tab) and remember it.","status":"needs_you"}]

useCases.title: Draft the positioning doc that anchors every other output
useCases.blurb: ICP, category, differentiators, brand voice, primary CTA.
useCases.prompt: Help me write my positioning statement.
useCases.fullPrompt: Help me write my full positioning doc: ICP, category, differentiators, brand voice, pricing stance, primary CTA. Use the define-positioning skill. Interview me briefly, then write to context/marketing-context.md — the source of truth every other skill in this agent reads before it produces copy, content, or campaigns.
useCases.description: I interview you briefly and write the full positioning doc (ICP, category, differentiators, brand voice, pricing stance, primary CTA) to context/marketing-context.md. Every other skill reads it first.
useCases.outcome: A locked positioning doc at context/marketing-context.md. Every skill that writes copy, content, or campaigns reads it.

useCases.title: Build a buyer persona from your closed-won accounts
useCases.blurb: Real JTBD, pains, triggers — pulled from your CRM.
useCases.prompt: Build a buyer persona for {segment} from my HubSpot closed-won accounts.
useCases.fullPrompt: Build a buyer persona for {segment}. Use the profile-icp skill. Pull my top closed-won accounts from my connected CRM (HubSpot / Attio / Salesforce via Composio), extract common firmographics, roles, and decision-maker patterns, then synthesize pains ranked by frequency, jobs-to-be-done, triggers that mean they're in-market, objection patterns, and 1–2 anchor accounts. Save to personas/{slug}.md.
useCases.description: Pull top closed-won accounts from your connected CRM (HubSpot / Attio / Salesforce) and synthesize a persona with JTBD, pains ranked by frequency, triggers, objection patterns, and anchor accounts.
useCases.outcome: Persona at personas/{slug}.md — the foundation ad copy and landing pages pull from.

useCases.title: Weekly competitor pulse across 3 rivals
useCases.blurb: Blog + product + ads + social. Threats vs noise.
useCases.prompt: Weekly competitor pulse across {A}, {B}, {C} — what did they ship?
useCases.fullPrompt: Give me this week's competitor pulse across {Competitor A}, {Competitor B}, {Competitor C}. Use the monitor-competitors skill with source=product. Scan each competitor's recent blog posts, product updates, release notes, and pricing pages via Firecrawl. Filter real threats from noise. Save to competitor-briefs/product-weekly-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I scan each competitor's blog, product updates, and pricing via Firecrawl. Single-competitor teardown or N-competitor weekly digest, filtered for real threats vs noise.
useCases.outcome: Weekly digest at competitor-briefs/product-weekly-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md — moves to respond to + ignore list.

useCases.title: Deep teardown of one competitor
useCases.blurb: Positioning, pricing, content, where we can press.
useCases.prompt: Do a full teardown of {competitor}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Do a full teardown of {competitor}. Use the monitor-competitors skill with source=product. Go deep on all dimensions via Firecrawl: positioning statement, pricing page, content strategy, messaging patterns, unguarded flanks we should press. Save to competitor-briefs/product-{competitor-slug}.md.
useCases.description: One competitor, all dimensions via web scrape: positioning, pricing, content strategy, messaging patterns, unguarded flanks to attack.
useCases.outcome: Teardown at competitor-briefs/product-{competitor}.md. Send it to the paid campaign skill for ad angles.

useCases.title: Research a topic for a brief you can act on
useCases.blurb: Exa-powered deep research with sources cited.
useCases.prompt: Research {topic} with Exa and give me a structured brief.
useCases.fullPrompt: Research {topic} with Exa and give me a structured brief. Use the synthesize-research skill. Deep research via connected Exa (or Perplexity / Firecrawl fallback), cite sources, and deliver key findings + 3–5 angles worth writing about. Save to research/{slug}.md so downstream content / ad / landing-page skills can pull from it.
useCases.description: Deep research via Exa (or Perplexity / Firecrawl fallback). Structured brief with cited sources and 3–5 angles worth writing about.
useCases.outcome: Brief at research/{slug}.md. Hand to the write-content or write-page-copy skills for drafting.

useCases.title: Mine your sales calls for real customer language
useCases.blurb: Verbatim pains + objections + positioning wedges.
useCases.prompt: Mine my last 10 sales calls from Gong for objections.
useCases.fullPrompt: Mine my last 10 sales calls from my connected call-recording app (Gong / Fireflies via Composio) for positioning signals. Use the mine-sales-calls skill. Extract verbatim customer phrases, rank pains by frequency, surface objection patterns, and flag positioning wedges. Save to call-insights/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: Pull transcripts from your connected call-recording app (Gong / Fireflies), extract verbatim customer phrases, rank pains by frequency, flag positioning wedges.
useCases.outcome: Insights at call-insights/{date}.md — the single best source for ad copy and landing-page headlines.

useCases.title: Sequence a 2-week launch across every domain
useCases.blurb: Pre-launch, launch day, post-launch — one plan.
useCases.prompt: Plan the {feature} launch over 2 weeks.
useCases.fullPrompt: Plan the {feature} launch over the next 2 weeks. Use the plan-campaign skill with type=launch. Break it into pre-launch (7d out), launch day, post-launch. Each task tagged with the right follow-up skill in this agent (write-content for launch post, plan-campaign type=paid for ad creative, plan-campaign type=announcement for email + in-app, write-page-copy for landing updates). Save to campaigns/launch-{slug}.md.
useCases.description: I break the launch into pre-launch (7d out), launch day, post-launch. Each task tagged to the follow-up skill inside this same agent — no cross-agent handoffs.
useCases.outcome: Sequenced plan at campaigns/launch-{slug}.md with owner + timing per task.

useCases.title: The Monday marketing health review
useCases.blurb: What shipped, what's stale, what to do next.
useCases.prompt: Give me the Monday marketing health review.
useCases.fullPrompt: Give me the Monday marketing health review. Use the analyze skill with subject=marketing-health. Aggregate everything I produced this week across all domains (blog posts, campaigns, emails, social, page copy) from outputs.json, flag gaps (e.g. 'no email shipped in 3 weeks'), and recommend next moves grouped by domain. Save to analyses/marketing-health-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I aggregate everything this agent produced this week across all 6 domains from outputs.json, flag gaps, recommend next moves. A 2-minute scan.
useCases.outcome: Review at analyses/marketing-health-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md with recommended next moves per domain.

useCases.title: Run a full SEO audit of your site
useCases.blurb: 10 prioritized fixes — impact × ease, no wall of warnings.
useCases.prompt: Run an SEO audit of my site with Semrush.
useCases.fullPrompt: Run a full SEO audit of my site. Use the audit skill with surface=site-seo. Pull on-page + technical via my connected Semrush (or Ahrefs / Firecrawl fallback). Score issues by impact × ease, not severity level. Give me the top 10 prioritized fixes with the exact change each one needs (title tag, schema, internal link, missing alt, etc.). Save to audits/site-seo-{domain}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: On-page + technical audit via Semrush (or Ahrefs / Firecrawl fallback). Ranks issues by impact × ease, not severity — a fix list, not a wall of warnings.
useCases.outcome: Scored audit at audits/site-seo-{domain}-{date}.md — 10 prioritized fixes you can ship this week.

useCases.title: Check visibility in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini
useCases.blurb: GEO audit: schema, mentions, source authority.
useCases.prompt: How do I show up in AI search? Run a GEO audit.
useCases.fullPrompt: How does my product show up in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini? Use the audit skill with surface=ai-search. Probe AI engines for my brand and category terms, then recommend Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) changes — schema, mentions, source authority, content tweaks. Save to audits/ai-search-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I probe AI search engines for your brand and category terms, then recommend GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) changes: schema, mentions, source authority, content tweaks.
useCases.outcome: AI-search audit at audits/ai-search-{date}.md with concrete content + schema changes.

useCases.title: Build the keyword map you can actually own
useCases.blurb: Clusters by intent × difficulty. Top 3 pillars.
useCases.prompt: Run keyword research with Semrush for {topic}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Run keyword research with Semrush for {topic}. Use the research-keywords skill. Cluster by intent and difficulty, flag the 3 pillars worth owning (not the top 50), and draft cluster briefs. Maintain the living keyword-map.md and per-cluster detail at keyword-clusters/{slug}.md.
useCases.description: I cluster keywords by intent and difficulty via Semrush (or Ahrefs). Flag the 3 pillars worth owning. Draft cluster briefs. No vanity keyword dumps.
useCases.outcome: Living keyword-map.md + per-cluster briefs at keyword-clusters/{slug}.md.

useCases.title: Find your content gap vs a competitor
useCases.blurb: Gaps ranked by volume × how easily we take them.
useCases.prompt: Where's our content gap vs {competitor}?
useCases.fullPrompt: Where's our content gap vs {competitor}? Use the analyze skill with subject=content-gap. Crawl their content via Firecrawl, compare to ours, and rank gaps by search volume × how easily we could take the topic. Save to analyses/content-gap-{competitor}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md with a first-draft brief per gap.
useCases.description: I crawl their content via Firecrawl, compare to ours, and rank gaps by search volume × how easily we could take the topic.
useCases.outcome: Ranked gap list at analyses/content-gap-{competitor}-{date}.md with a first-draft brief per gap.

useCases.title: Draft a full SEO-targeted blog post
useCases.blurb: 2,000–3,000 words with meta, slug, internal links, CTA.
useCases.prompt: Draft a blog post on {topic} targeting {keyword}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a blog post on {topic} targeting {keyword}. Use the write-content skill with channel=blog. 2,000–3,000 words with proper H1/H2/H3, meta description, URL slug, internal-link suggestions, and one clear CTA. Reads like I wrote it. Save to blog-posts/{slug}.md and also save to my connected Google Docs if one's linked.
useCases.description: 2,000–3,000-word draft with H1/H2/H3, meta description, URL slug, internal-link suggestions, and one clear CTA. Saved to a Google Doc if connected. Reads like you wrote it.
useCases.outcome: Draft at blog-posts/{slug}.md (+ Google Doc if connected). Paste into your CMS.

useCases.title: Turn a happy customer into a case study
useCases.blurb: Challenge → approach → results — with real numbers.
useCases.prompt: Draft a case study for {customer} from Airtable notes.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a case study for {customer}. Use the write-case-study skill. Pull the interview / email thread / testimonial from my connected Airtable (or other notes app via Composio), or use what I paste. Structure as challenge → approach → results with real numbers, not marketer-speak. Save to case-studies/{customer-slug}.md.
useCases.description: I pull the interview / email thread / testimonial (from Airtable / notes app / paste) and structure as challenge → approach → results with real numbers — not marketer-speak.
useCases.outcome: Case study at case-studies/{customer}.md ready for sales + your website.

useCases.title: Turn one blog post into 5 LinkedIn posts
useCases.blurb: Each reshaped for LinkedIn's native format.
useCases.prompt: Turn {blog post URL} into 5 LinkedIn posts.
useCases.fullPrompt: Turn {blog post URL} into 5 LinkedIn posts. Use the repurpose-content skill. Extract the core ideas via Firecrawl and reshape each into a LinkedIn-native post (hook, whitespace, one clear takeaway) I can copy into the write-content skill's LinkedIn channel to ship. Save to repurposed/{source-slug}-to-linkedin.md.
useCases.description: I extract the core ideas via Firecrawl and reshape each into a LinkedIn-native post (hook, whitespace, one clear takeaway).
useCases.outcome: 5 drafts at repurposed/{source}-to-linkedin.md.

useCases.title: Turn a YouTube video into a blog draft
useCases.blurb: Transcript → long-form SEO-structured draft.
useCases.prompt: Turn {YouTube URL} into a blog post draft.
useCases.fullPrompt: Turn {YouTube URL} into a blog post draft. Use the repurpose-content skill. Fetch the transcript via YouTube (Composio) and rewrite as a long-form blog draft with SEO structure (H1/H2, keywords, meta). Great for founder interviews, conference talks, or live sessions. Save to repurposed/{video-slug}-to-blog.md.
useCases.description: I fetch the transcript via YouTube and rewrite as a long-form blog draft with SEO structure. Great for conference talks, founder interviews, live sessions.
useCases.outcome: Draft at repurposed/{video}-to-blog.md.

useCases.title: Find backlink targets + draft the pitches
useCases.blurb: Per-site pitch emails — no template spam.
useCases.prompt: Find backlink targets with Ahrefs and draft the pitches.
useCases.fullPrompt: Find backlink targets and draft the pitches. Use the find-backlinks skill. Identify target sites via SERP + my connected Ahrefs (backlink tool) that match our niche, then draft per-target pitch emails grounded in what we actually offer them. Save to backlink-plans/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I identify target sites via SERP + Ahrefs (backlink tool) that match your niche, then draft per-target pitch emails grounded in what you actually offer them.
useCases.outcome: Backlink plan at backlink-plans/{date}.md with outreach drafts per target.

useCases.title: Draft a 5-email welcome series for new signups
useCases.blurb: Day 0 / 1 / 3 / 7 / 14 — subject, body, CTA, metric.
useCases.prompt: Draft a 5-email welcome series for new signups.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a 5-email welcome series for new signups. Use the plan-campaign skill with type=welcome. Day 0 / 1 / 3 / 7 / 14 default (override any cadence). Each email: subject, preview, body, CTA, success metric. Formatted for my connected ESP (Customer.io / Loops / Mailchimp / Kit — via Composio). Save to campaigns/welcome-{variant}.md.
useCases.description: Day 0 / 1 / 3 / 7 / 14 sequence (override any cadence). Each email: subject, preview, body, CTA, success metric. Formatted for your connected ESP.
useCases.outcome: Full sequence at campaigns/welcome-{variant}.md. Drop into your platform.

useCases.title: Re-activate signups who never activated
useCases.blurb: Event-triggered drip with honest stopping rules.
useCases.prompt: Design a re-activation drip for users who never activated.
useCases.fullPrompt: Design a re-activation drip for users who signed up but never activated. Use the plan-campaign skill with type=lifecycle-drip. Event-triggered: trigger event, frequency rules, branching by user action, drafted copy per email. Honest about when to stop emailing. Save to campaigns/lifecycle-drip-{slug}.md.
useCases.description: Event-triggered drip: trigger event, frequency rules, branching by user action, drafted copy per email. Honest about when to stop emailing.
useCases.outcome: Drip plan at campaigns/lifecycle-drip-{slug}.md with every branch labeled.

useCases.title: Draft this week's newsletter
useCases.blurb: One through-line. Pulls source from recent outputs.
useCases.prompt: Draft this week's newsletter — here's what shipped.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft this week's newsletter. Use the write-content skill with channel=newsletter. Subject + preview + body with one clear through-line (not 5 updates glued together). Pull source material from this week's blog posts / case studies / launches in outputs.json if relevant. Save to newsletters/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md ready for my connected Beehiiv / Substack / ESP.
useCases.description: Subject + preview + body with one clear through-line. Pulls source material from this week's blog / case-study / launch outputs if relevant.
useCases.outcome: Newsletter at newsletters/{date}.md ready for your ESP.

useCases.title: Save a downgrade without the guilt trip
useCases.blurb: Genuine option — pause / downgrade / concierge / refund.
useCases.prompt: Draft a save email for accounts that downgraded in Stripe.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a save email for accounts that downgraded. Use the plan-campaign skill with type=churn-save. Pull the downgrade signal from my connected Stripe / HubSpot if available. No guilt tactics, no fake scarcity. Offer a genuine option (pause / downgrade further / concierge help / refund). Tone matches my voice. Save to campaigns/churn-save-{persona}.md.
useCases.description: No guilt tactics, no fake scarcity. Offer a genuine option (pause / downgrade further / concierge help / refund). Tone matches your voice.
useCases.outcome: Save email at campaigns/churn-save-{persona}.md.

useCases.title: Product announcement — email + in-app, coordinated
useCases.blurb: Email body and matching in-app copy together.
useCases.prompt: Plan the email + in-app announcement for {feature}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Plan the email + in-app announcement for {feature}. Use the plan-campaign skill with type=announcement. Draft the announcement email AND matching in-app copy (banner / modal / empty-state nudge), keyed to the launch plan at campaigns/launch-{feature}.md if one exists. Save to campaigns/announcement-{feature-slug}.md.
useCases.description: Announcement email AND matching in-app copy (banner / modal / empty-state nudge), keyed to the launch plan if one exists.
useCases.outcome: Full set at campaigns/announcement-{feature}.md — email body + in-app strings.

useCases.title: Draft a LinkedIn post in your voice
useCases.blurb: Hook, whitespace, takeaway, CTA — your voice.
useCases.prompt: Draft a LinkedIn post about {topic} in my voice.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a LinkedIn post about {topic} in my voice. Use the write-content skill with channel=linkedin. Hook in the first line, whitespace, one clear takeaway, CTA or question to spark replies. Uses my saved voice samples so it doesn't sound like AI. Save to posts/linkedin-{slug}.md.
useCases.description: Hook in the first line, whitespace, one clear takeaway, CTA or question. Uses your saved voice samples so it doesn't sound like AI.
useCases.outcome: Draft at posts/linkedin-{slug}.md — paste into LinkedIn when ready.

useCases.title: Draft a 7-tweet X thread
useCases.blurb: Hook + numbered progression + CTA. 280 chars each.
useCases.prompt: Draft a 7-tweet X thread on {topic}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a 7-tweet X thread on {topic}. Use the write-content skill with channel=x-thread. Hook tweet, numbered progression, CTA tweet at the end. Each tweet fits the 280-char budget with room for edits. Save to threads/x-{slug}.md.
useCases.description: Hook tweet, numbered progression, CTA tweet at the end. Each tweet fits the 280-char budget with room for edits.
useCases.outcome: Thread at threads/x-{slug}.md — copy tweet-by-tweet into your scheduler.

useCases.title: Reply to a Reddit thread the right way
useCases.blurb: Value-first, no pitch, link only if relevant.
useCases.prompt: Draft a Reddit reply to {thread URL}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a Reddit reply to {thread URL}. Use the write-content skill with channel=reddit. Pull the source thread via Reddit (Composio) / Firecrawl fallback, then draft a value-first reply. Helpful first, link only if it truly belongs. Save to community-replies/{source-slug}.md.
useCases.description: I pull the source thread (via Reddit / Firecrawl) and draft a value-first reply. Helpful first, link only if it truly belongs.
useCases.outcome: Reply at community-replies/{source}.md.

useCases.title: Plan this week's social calendar
useCases.blurb: Mon–Fri per platform, mixing new + repurposed.
useCases.prompt: Plan this week's social across LinkedIn and X.
useCases.fullPrompt: Plan this week's social content across LinkedIn and X. Use the plan-social-calendar skill. Mon–Fri per platform, keyed to my topics, mixing original posts with repurposed content from outputs.json (zero duplicate angles). Save to social-calendars/{YYYY-WNN}.md and append to social-calendar.md.
useCases.description: Mon–Fri plan per platform (LinkedIn / X / Reddit), keyed to your topics, mixing original posts with repurposed content from this agent's outputs (zero duplicate angles).
useCases.outcome: Calendar at social-calendars/{YYYY-WNN}.md + appended to living social-calendar.md.

useCases.title: Scan your X timeline for what to engage with
useCases.blurb: Filtered for your topics. Suggested reply drafts.
useCases.prompt: Scan my X timeline and surface engagement opportunities.
useCases.fullPrompt: Scan my X timeline and surface what's worth engaging with. Use the monitor-competitors skill with source=social-feed. Filter my feed for relevance to my topics and engagement opportunities, then suggest concrete replies — no doom-scrolling. Save to competitor-briefs/social-feed-x-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md with reply drafts per opportunity.
useCases.description: I filter your feed for relevance to your topics and engagement opportunities, then suggest concrete replies — no more doom-scrolling for something to comment on.
useCases.outcome: Digest at competitor-briefs/social-feed-x-{date}.md with reply drafts.

useCases.title: Weekly LinkedIn digest — how your posts did
useCases.blurb: Your stats + notable network posts worth commenting on.
useCases.prompt: Give me the weekly LinkedIn digest.
useCases.fullPrompt: Give me the weekly LinkedIn digest. Use the digest-linkedin-activity skill. Pull stats on my own posts (reach, engagement, new followers) via my connected LinkedIn plus notable posts in my network worth commenting on. A 5-minute read. Save to linkedin-digests/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md for Monday morning.
useCases.description: Stats on your own posts (reach, engagement, new followers) plus notable posts in your network worth commenting on. 5-minute read.
useCases.outcome: Digest at linkedin-digests/{date}.md for Monday morning.

useCases.title: Get yourself booked on your ICP's podcasts
useCases.blurb: Per-show pitches — hook, angle, proof, ask.
useCases.prompt: Draft podcast outreach for 5 shows our ICP listens to.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft podcast outreach for 5 shows our ICP listens to. Use the pitch-podcast skill. Identify target shows by audience fit via Listen Notes and draft per-show pitches: hook based on my positioning, angle, proof, clear ask. No template spam. Save to podcast-pitches/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I identify target shows by audience fit (via Listen Notes) and draft per-show pitches: hook based on your positioning, angle, proof, clear ask. No template spam.
useCases.outcome: Pitches at podcast-pitches/{date}.md — one per show, send from your own email.

useCases.title: Plan a Google Ads search campaign
useCases.blurb: Audience, ad-groups, budget, KPIs — before a dollar.
useCases.prompt: Plan a Google Ads search campaign for {keyword cluster}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Plan a Google Ads search campaign for {keyword cluster}. Use the plan-campaign skill with type=paid. Full brief: audience, keyword/placement strategy, ad-group structure, suggested budget, landing-page requirements, KPI targets. Save to campaigns/paid-{channel}-{slug}.md — spec the experiment before I spend a dollar.
useCases.description: Full campaign brief: audience, keyword/placement strategy, ad-group structure, suggested budget, landing-page requirements, KPI targets.
useCases.outcome: Campaign brief at campaigns/paid-{channel}-{slug}.md — spec before you spend a dollar.

useCases.title: Teardown a competitor's live ads
useCases.blurb: Angles, hooks, offers they're testing right now.
useCases.prompt: Teardown {competitor}'s ads from Meta Ad Library.
useCases.fullPrompt: Teardown {competitor}'s current ads. Use the monitor-competitors skill with source=ads. Pull live creative from Meta Ad Library, LinkedIn Ad Library, and Google Ads Transparency (via Composio scrape), then extract angles, hooks, and offers they're testing. Save to competitor-briefs/ads-{competitor}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I pull live creative from Meta Ad Library, LinkedIn Ad Library, and Google Ads Transparency (via Composio scrape), then extract the angles, hooks, and offers they're testing.
useCases.outcome: Ad teardown at competitor-briefs/ads-{competitor}-{date}.md — research for your own ad copy.

useCases.title: Draft ad copy grounded in real customer language
useCases.blurb: 10 variants with the source quote next to each.
useCases.prompt: Draft 10 ad variants grounded in real customer language.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft 10 ad variants grounded in real customer language. Use the generate-ad-copy skill. Pull phrases from my call-insights/ folder (or G2 / Capterra / Trustpilot reviews via scrape) and write headlines + descriptions that sound like my customers talking, not a marketer pitching. Save to ad-copy/{campaign-slug}.md with the source quote alongside each headline.
useCases.description: I pull phrases from your call insights (or G2 / Capterra / Trustpilot reviews via scrape) and write headlines + descriptions that sound like your customers talking — not a marketer pitching.
useCases.outcome: Variants at ad-copy/{campaign}.md with the source quote alongside each headline.

useCases.title: Rigorously critique a landing page
useCases.blurb: 6 dimensions 0–3, prioritized fix list.
useCases.prompt: Critique the landing page at {url}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Critique the landing page at {url}. Use the audit skill with surface=landing-page. Fetch the page via Firecrawl and score 6 dimensions 0–3 (headline clarity, value prop, social proof, CTA, objection handling, visual hierarchy). Give me a prioritized fix list — not a generic lecture. Save to audits/landing-page-{url-slug}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md. For a rewrite, follow up with the write-page-copy skill.
useCases.description: I fetch the page via Firecrawl and score 6 dimensions 0–3 (headline, value prop, social proof, CTA, objection handling, visual hierarchy). Prioritized fix list, not a generic lecture.
useCases.outcome: Teardown at audits/landing-page-{url}-{date}.md. Copy the fixes into your tracker.

useCases.title: Design a proper A/B test
useCases.blurb: Hypothesis, MDE, power, go/no-go — no coin flip.
useCases.prompt: Design an A/B test for the pricing page headline.
useCases.fullPrompt: Design an A/B test for the pricing page headline. Use the design-ab-test skill. Full spec: hypothesis (PICOT), control vs variant, primary + secondary metrics, sample-size estimate with MDE + power, duration, go/no-go criteria. Save to ab-tests/{slug}.md so I don't ship the loser.
useCases.description: Full spec: hypothesis (PICOT), control vs variant, primary + secondary metrics, sample-size estimate with MDE + power, duration, go/no-go criteria.
useCases.outcome: Test spec at ab-tests/{slug}.md. Paste into your experimentation tool.

useCases.title: Spec event tracking + a UTM matrix
useCases.blurb: Events, properties, UTM rules — hand to engineering.
useCases.prompt: Spec the event tracking plan for sign-up → activation.
useCases.fullPrompt: Spec the event tracking plan for sign-up → activation. Use the setup-tracking skill. Event names, triggers, properties, owner per step. UTM matrix so paid / social / email are comparable in my connected GA4 / PostHog. Save to tracking-plans/{slug}.md.
useCases.description: Event names, triggers, properties, and owner per step. Plus a UTM matrix so paid / social / email are comparable in GA4 / your analytics.
useCases.outcome: Plan at tracking-plans/{slug}.md — hand to engineering.

useCases.title: Weekly funnel readout — find the leak
useCases.blurb: Biggest drop + 2-3 experiments ranked by lift × effort.
useCases.prompt: Give me this week's funnel readout from PostHog.
useCases.fullPrompt: Give me the weekly funnel readout. Use the analyze skill with subject=funnel. Compute conversion at each step from my connected PostHog / Mixpanel / GA4 (or paste), flag the biggest drop, and recommend 2–3 experiments ranked by expected lift × effort. Save to analyses/funnel-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md — clear next actions, not a dashboard dump.
useCases.description: Compute conversion at each step (from your connected PostHog / Mixpanel / GA4, or paste), flag the biggest drop, recommend 2–3 experiments by lift × effort.
useCases.outcome: Review at analyses/funnel-{date}.md — clear next actions, not a dashboard dump.

useCases.title: Rewrite your homepage (or any landing page)

useCases.fullPrompt: Write copy for {page}. Use the write-page-copy skill with surface=homepage (or pricing / about / landing). Full page copy grounded in my positioning and real customer language (from call-insights/ or G2 / Capterra reviews). Sections, headlines, bodies, CTAs, social-proof placement. Save to page-copy/homepage-{slug}.md.
useCases.description: Full page copy grounded in your positioning and real customer language. Sections, headlines, bodies, CTAs, social-proof placement.
useCases.outcome: Draft at page-copy/{surface}-{slug}.md.

useCases.fullPrompt: Edit this copy. Use the edit-copy skill. Tighten in my voice: cut adjectives, remove marketer-speak, add specificity, fix rhythm. Preserve intent. Save an edited version to copy-edits/{slug}.md with before/after notes.
useCases.description: I tighten existing copy in your voice: cut adjectives, remove marketer-speak, add specificity, fix rhythm. Preserves intent.
useCases.outcome: Edited version at copy-edits/{slug}.md with before/after notes.

useCases.title: 10 headline variants grounded in real quotes
useCases.blurb: Each cites the customer quote behind it.

useCases.fullPrompt: Give me 10 headlines for {page}. Use the write-headline-variants skill. Each headline + subhead pair grounded in a verbatim customer quote, review line, or positioning-doc claim. No marketer-speak. Top 3 ranked to test first. Save to headline-variants/{page-slug}.md.
useCases.description: 10 headline + subhead pairs, each grounded in a verbatim customer quote, review line, or positioning-doc claim. No marketer-speak. Top 3 ranked to test first.

useCases.title: Better CTAs paired with the objection they answer

useCases.prompt: Give me CTA variants for {button}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Give me CTA variants for {button}. Use the write-cta-variants skill. Each variant paired with the objection it answers. Grounded in pains from my call-insights/. Save to cta-variants/{page-slug}.md.
useCases.description: CTA button copy variants, each paired with the objection it answers (e.g. 'Start free — no credit card required'). Grounded in pains from your call insights.

useCases.title: Audit a form that's leaking conversions

useCases.prompt: Audit my {demo/contact/lead} form — too many fields.
useCases.fullPrompt: Audit my {form type} form. Use the audit skill with surface=form. Flag unnecessary fields, rewrite labels + helper text, and sequence fields by friction. Save to audits/form-{form-slug}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md. For signup flows specifically, use surface=signup-flow with the write-page-copy skill instead.
useCases.description: I review a form (demo / contact / lead), flag unnecessary fields, rewrite labels + helper text, and sequence fields by friction.
useCases.outcome: Audit at audits/form-{form}.md.

useCases.description: End-to-end signup audit: pre-signup page, email field, password requirements, verification, first-screen post-signup. Copy + field-level recs.
useCases.outcome: Review at page-copy/signup-flow-{slug}.md.
